name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” White/Small Pink Heart
name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” White/Small Pink Heart
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dyed linen consistent with ZPгҖҪпёҸ, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matteрҹӨҹ. The leather is top-grain calfskinрҹ‘ӣ flexible and non-irritatingрҹ’Ә. With custom hand-painted details, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and coin purseрҹҺҖвһ•gift boxрҹҺҒвһ•upgraded manualрҹ’Ң
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
рҹ”Һ020660
